title: 2011 Audi DTC Reference – P-Codes and U-Codes
description: Complete Diagnostic Trouble Code reference for 2011 Audi A3, A4, A5, and A6. P-codes use OBD-II standard + Audi-specific descriptions. U-codes extracted directly from ALLDATA 10.52SS.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake (A) Camshaft Position Slow Response Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Camshaft signal change < 1.9–42 °CRK/s
diagnostic_procedure: Check the Camshaft Adjustment Valve 1 (N205).
Refer to [Camshaft Adjustment Valve, Checking].
Inspect variable valve timing oil supply and pressure.
Check camshaft position sensor (G40) wiring and connections.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake (A) Camshaft Position Actuator Circuit / Open Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Signal voltage > 4.40–5.60 V with camshaft valve off
diagnostic_procedure: Check the Camshaft Adjustment Valve 1 (N205).
Refer to [Camshaft Adjustment Valve, Checking].
Inspect wiring harness and connector to N205 for open circuit or short.
Check ECM output voltage for camshaft actuator control.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake (A) Camshaft Position Timing Over-Advanced Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Target error (Stuck position) > 6.8–8 °CRK
diagnostic_procedure: Check the Camshaft Adjustment Valve 1 (N205).
Refer to [Camshaft Adjustment Valve, Checking].
Check engine oil level, quality and pressure.
Inspect VVT solenoid valve for sticking or contamination.
Check camshaft timing and timing chain stretch.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: High Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP) – Cam Follower Wear
codes.malfunction_criteria: HPFP delivery quantity adaptation at limit indicating cam follower wear
diagnostic_procedure: Check HPFP cam follower for excessive wear.
Inspect camshaft lobe for HPFP drive.
Replace cam follower and HPFP if worn.
Refer to [High Pressure Fuel Pump, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: High Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP) – Delivery Quantity Too Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: HPFP delivery below minimum specification
diagnostic_procedure: Check low-pressure fuel supply to HPFP.
Inspect HPFP inlet metering valve (N276).
Check cam follower condition.
Refer to [High Pressure Fuel Pump, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: High Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP) – Delivery Quantity Too High
codes.malfunction_criteria: HPFP delivery above maximum specification
diagnostic_procedure: Check HPFP inlet metering valve (N276) for sticking open.
Inspect fuel pressure relief valve.
Refer to [High Pressure Fuel Pump, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Crankshaft Position – Camshaft Position Correlation Bank 1 Sensor A
codes.malfunction_criteria: Permissible deviation > or < 11.0 revolutions
diagnostic_procedure: Check the Camshaft Position Sensor (G40). Refer to [Camshaft Position Sensor, Checking].
Inspect timing chain for stretch or wear.
Check crankshaft position sensor (G28) signal.
Verify timing chain guides and tensioner condition.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Pump Module Control Circuit / Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: Signal voltage > 4.40–5.60 V with engine running
diagnostic_procedure: Check the fuel pump. Refer to [Fuel Pump Electrical, Testing].
Inspect wiring between ECM and fuel pump module for open circuit.
Check fuel pump relay and fuse.
Measure supply voltage at fuel pump connector.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Pump Module Control Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Signal voltage above threshold with pump commanded off
diagnostic_procedure: Check the fuel pump. Refer to [Fuel Pump Electrical, Testing].
Inspect for short to voltage in fuel pump control wiring.
Check ECM driver circuit for fuel pump.
Test fuel pump module for internal fault.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Pump Short to B+
codes.malfunction_criteria: Short circuit current > 9 A
diagnostic_procedure: Check the fuel pump. Refer to [Fuel Pump Electrical, Testing].
Inspect fuel pump wiring harness for short to battery voltage.
Check fuel pump module connector and terminals.
Replace fuel pump assembly if internal short confirmed.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Heater resistance out of range (128–648 Ω at 8–40°C)
diagnostic_procedure: Check the Oxygen Sensor (O2S) Heater (Z19). Refer to [O2S Heater Control Circuit, Checking].
Inspect heater circuit wiring for open or short.
Measure O2 sensor heater resistance.
Check ECM heater control output.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Low Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Heater circuit voltage below lower threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check oxygen sensor heater circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].
Inspect wiring and connector at O2 sensor.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit High Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Heater circuit voltage above upper threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check oxygen sensor heater circuit for short to battery voltage.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].
Inspect wiring and connector at O2 sensor.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor heater resistance out of range
diagnostic_procedure: Check the downstream Oxygen Sensor (O2S) heater.
Refer to [O2S Heater Control Circuit, Checking].
Measure heater resistance and supply voltage at sensor.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Low Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream heater circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor heater circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit High Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream heater circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor heater circuit for short to battery.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor heater resistance out of range
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor heater circuit.
Refer to [O2S Heater Control Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit Low Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 heater circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor heater circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit High Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 heater circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor heater circuit for short to battery.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cold Start Idle Air Control System Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Idle speed deviation from target during cold start
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle body and idle air control valve for carbon deposits.
Inspect intake manifold for vacuum leaks.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Cleaning].
Check engine coolant temperature sensor (G62).

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: MAP/MAF – Throttle Position Correlation
codes.malfunction_criteria: MAP/MAF signal does not correlate with throttle position
diagnostic_procedure: Check intake manifold pressure sensor (G71) and mass air flow sensor (G70).
Inspect throttle body (J338) and throttle position sensor.
Check for intake manifold leaks.
Refer to [Manifold Absolute Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ambient Air Temperature Sensor Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Ambient temperature sensor signal implausible
diagnostic_procedure: Check ambient temperature sensor wiring and connector.
Measure sensor resistance vs. temperature.
Refer to [Ambient Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ambient Air Temperature Sensor Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Sensor signal within range but implausible vs. other inputs
diagnostic_procedure: Check ambient temperature sensor for contamination or poor mounting.
Compare sensor reading vs. known temperature.
Refer to [Ambient Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ambient Air Temperature Sensor Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Sensor voltage below lower limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check ambient temperature sensor circuit for short to ground.
Measure sensor resistance.
Refer to [Ambient Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail / System Pressure Too Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel rail pressure below target threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check fuel pressure with fuel pressure gauge.
Inspect fuel pump for adequate delivery volume.
Check high-pressure fuel pump (HPFP) and low-pressure supply pump.
Inspect fuel pressure regulator and fuel injectors for leakage.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Mass Air Flow Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: MAF signal implausible relative to engine speed and load
diagnostic_procedure: Check Mass Air Flow (MAF) sensor (G70).
Inspect intake system for vacuum leaks upstream of MAF.
Clean MAF sensor hot wire element.
Refer to [Mass Air Flow Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Mass Air Flow Sensor Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: MAF sensor signal below minimum threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check MAF sensor circuit for open or short to ground.
Inspect sensor connector and wiring.
Refer to [Mass Air Flow Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Mass Air Flow Sensor Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: MAF sensor signal above maximum threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check MAF sensor circuit for short to voltage.
Inspect sensor connector and wiring.
Refer to [Mass Air Flow Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Manifold Absolute Pressure / Barometric Pressure Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: MAP signal out of plausible range for given conditions
diagnostic_procedure: Check Manifold Absolute Pressure (MAP) sensor (G71).
Inspect vacuum line to MAP sensor for leaks or blockage.
Refer to [Manifold Absolute Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: IAT signal implausible vs. coolant temperature at startup
diagnostic_procedure: Check Intake Air Temperature (IAT) sensor (G42) in MAF sensor.
Compare IAT vs. ambient temperature after cold soak.
Refer to [Intake Air Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: IAT voltage below minimum threshold (shorted to ground)
diagnostic_procedure: Check IAT sensor circuit for short to ground.
Measure sensor resistance.
Refer to [Intake Air Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: IAT voltage above maximum threshold (open circuit)
diagnostic_procedure: Check IAT sensor circuit for open circuit.
Inspect sensor connector and wiring.
Refer to [Intake Air Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECT signal implausible – no warm-up progression
diagnostic_procedure: Check Engine Coolant Temperature (ECT) sensor (G62).
Verify coolant level and thermostat operation.
Compare ECT vs. IAT after cold soak.
Refer to [Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECT voltage below minimum threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check ECT sensor circuit for short to ground.
Measure ECT sensor resistance.
Refer to [Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECT voltage above maximum threshold (open circuit)
diagnostic_procedure: Check ECT sensor circuit for open circuit.
Inspect sensor connector pins for corrosion.
Refer to [Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch A Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor signal out of expected range
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor (G69) in throttle body (J338).
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].
Inspect wiring and connector at throttle body.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch A Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor voltage below lower threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch A Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor voltage above upper threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor circuit for short to voltage or open.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Malfunction Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: O2 sensor signal does not switch correctly
diagnostic_procedure: Check upstream O2 sensor (G39) and wiring.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].
Check for exhaust leaks upstream of sensor.
Verify sensor heater is operating.

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: O2 signal voltage permanently low (lean indication)
diagnostic_procedure: Check upstream O2 sensor for lean mixture or wiring fault.
Inspect for vacuum leaks or lean misfires.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: O2 signal voltage permanently high (rich indication)
diagnostic_procedure: Check upstream O2 sensor for rich mixture or contamination.
Inspect for fuel pressure or injector issues.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: O2 sensor switching frequency too slow
diagnostic_procedure: Check upstream O2 sensor (G39) for age-related deterioration.
Inspect heater circuit for proper heating time.
Replace O2 sensor if slow response confirmed.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction Bank 1 Sensor 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Heater resistance out of specification
diagnostic_procedure: Measure O2 sensor heater resistance (should be 2–30 Ω warm).
Check heater supply voltage and ground.
Refer to [O2S Heater Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Malfunction Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor signal malfunction
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor (G130) and wiring.
Verify catalytic converter efficiency.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor voltage permanently low
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor voltage permanently high
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor for contamination or rich exhaust.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor switching too slowly
diagnostic_procedure: Replace downstream O2 sensor if lazy response confirmed.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor signal stuck or no variation
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor and wiring for open circuit.
Verify sensor heater operation.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 heater resistance fault
diagnostic_procedure: Measure downstream O2 sensor heater resistance.
Check heater power supply and ECM control circuit.
Refer to [O2S Heater Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor general circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor and wiring.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor circuit for short to voltage.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor response too slow
diagnostic_procedure: Replace third O2 sensor if slow response confirmed.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor signal static
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor for open circuit or failure.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor heater circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Measure third O2 sensor heater resistance.
Check heater control circuit.
Refer to [O2S Heater Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: System Too Lean Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Long-term fuel trim exceeds lean correction limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check for vacuum leaks in intake system.
Inspect MAF sensor for contamination.
Check fuel pressure and fuel injector performance.
Inspect O2 sensor (G39) for accuracy.
Refer to [Fuel Trim, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: System Too Rich Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Long-term fuel trim exceeds rich correction limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check for fuel injector leakage or stuck-open injectors.
Inspect fuel pressure regulator.
Check MAF sensor for over-reading.
Inspect for coolant or oil contamination causing rich mixture.
Refer to [Fuel Trim, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor (G247) signal out of range
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Pressure Sensor (G247) wiring and connector.
Measure 5V reference and ground at sensor.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor signal implausible vs. actual pressure
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Pressure Sensor (G247) accuracy.
Compare sensor reading with mechanical fuel pressure gauge.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor voltage below minimum
diagnostic_procedure: Check fuel pressure sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 (N30) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 1 (N30) resistance and wiring.
Inspect injector connector for corrosion or damage.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 (N31) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 2 (N31) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 (N32) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 3 (N32) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 4
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 (N33) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 4 (N33) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor 2 signal implausible vs. sensor 1
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle body dual position sensors.
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor B voltage below threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor B for short to ground.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor B voltage above threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor B for short to voltage or open.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger/Supercharger Overboost Condition
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure exceeds upper limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check wastegate solenoid (N75) for proper operation.
Inspect charge pressure sensor (G31).
Check boost pressure control hoses for leaks.
Refer to [Turbocharger, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger/Supercharger Boost Sensor A Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor signal implausible
diagnostic_procedure: Check Charge Pressure Sensor (G31).
Verify 5V reference and ground at sensor.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Boost Sensor A Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor voltage below minimum
diagnostic_procedure: Check boost pressure sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Boost Sensor A Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor voltage above maximum
diagnostic_procedure: Check boost pressure sensor circuit for short to voltage.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid (N75) circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve (N75) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check N75 circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check N75 circuit for short to battery or open.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 1 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 1 (N30) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 1 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 1 (N30) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 2 (N31) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 2 (N31) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 3 (N32) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 3 (N32) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 4 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 4 (N33) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 4 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 4 (N33) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger / Supercharger Underboost Condition
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure below target threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for boost leaks in intercooler, charge pipes, and hoses.
Check wastegate solenoid (N75) and diaphragm.
Inspect turbocharger vanes or impeller for damage.
Check charge air pressure sensor (G31).
Refer to [Turbocharger, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Random / Multiple Cylinder Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate exceeds threshold on multiple cylinders
diagnostic_procedure: Check spark plugs for wear or fouling.
Inspect ignition coils (N70/N127/N291/N292) for failure.
Check fuel injectors for proper delivery.
Check for vacuum leaks causing lean misfire.
Inspect compression on all cylinders.
Refer to [Misfire Diagnosis].

diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 1 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 1 with another cylinder to isolate fault.
Check Injector 1 (N30) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 1, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate on cylinder 2 exceeds threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 2 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 2 to isolate fault.
Check Injector 2 (N31) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 2, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Misfire Detected

diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 3 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 3 to isolate fault.
Check Injector 3 (N32) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 3, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations

diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 4 spark plug.

Check Injector 4 (N33) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 4, Diagnosis].

codes.description: Knock Sensor 1 Circuit Low Input Bank 1

codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit High Input Bank 1

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Switching Valve B Circuit Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air injection valve B circuit open

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Relay A Circuit

Inspect EVAP hoses for cracks or disconnection.
Refer to [EVAP System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (small leak)

Check fuel cap seal and tank vent hoses.

Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Purge Control Valve Circuit Open

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (large leak / no flow)
codes.malfunction_criteria: Large EVAP leak or complete loss of pressure

Inspect EVAP lines and charcoal canister for damage.
Perform EVAP smoke test.
Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (very small leak)
codes.malfunction_criteria: Very small EVAP system leak detected

Perform EVAP smoke test with dye.
Check EVAP canister vent valve (N115).
Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: EVAP Purge Control Valve Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Purge valve circuit voltage low

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations

Replace ECM if fault persists.

codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor signal stuck or no variation
diagnostic_procedure: Check downstream O2 sensor and wiring for open circuit.
Verify sensor heater operation.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Malfunction Bank 1 Sensor 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 heater resistance fault
diagnostic_procedure: Measure downstream O2 sensor heater resistance.
Check heater power supply and ECM control circuit.
Refer to [O2S Heater Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor general circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor and wiring.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Low Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit High Voltage Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor circuit for short to voltage.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit Slow Response Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor response too slow
diagnostic_procedure: Replace third O2 sensor if slow response confirmed.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor signal static
diagnostic_procedure: Check third O2 sensor for open circuit or failure.
Refer to [Oxygen Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: O2 Sensor Heater Circuit Bank 1 Sensor 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Third O2 sensor heater circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Measure third O2 sensor heater resistance.
Check heater control circuit.
Refer to [O2S Heater Circuit, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: System Too Lean Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Long-term fuel trim exceeds lean correction limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check for vacuum leaks in intake system.
Inspect MAF sensor for contamination.
Check fuel pressure and fuel injector performance.
Inspect O2 sensor (G39) for accuracy.
Refer to [Fuel Trim, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: System Too Rich Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Long-term fuel trim exceeds rich correction limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check for fuel injector leakage or stuck-open injectors.
Inspect fuel pressure regulator.
Check MAF sensor for over-reading.
Inspect for coolant or oil contamination causing rich mixture.
Refer to [Fuel Trim, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor (G247) signal out of range
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Pressure Sensor (G247) wiring and connector.
Measure 5V reference and ground at sensor.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor signal implausible vs. actual pressure
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Pressure Sensor (G247) accuracy.
Compare sensor reading with mechanical fuel pressure gauge.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Rail Pressure Sensor Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Fuel pressure sensor voltage below minimum
diagnostic_procedure: Check fuel pressure sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 (N30) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 1 (N30) resistance and wiring.
Inspect injector connector for corrosion or damage.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 2
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 (N31) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 2 (N31) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 3
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 (N32) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 3 (N32) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Injector Circuit / Open – Cylinder 4
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 (N33) circuit open or excessive resistance
diagnostic_procedure: Check Fuel Injector 4 (N33) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor 2 signal implausible vs. sensor 1
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle body dual position sensors.
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit Low Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor B voltage below threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor B for short to ground.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B Circuit High Input
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle position sensor B voltage above threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle position sensor B for short to voltage or open.
Refer to [Throttle Body, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger/Supercharger Overboost Condition
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure exceeds upper limit
diagnostic_procedure: Check wastegate solenoid (N75) for proper operation.
Inspect charge pressure sensor (G31).
Check boost pressure control hoses for leaks.
Refer to [Turbocharger, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger/Supercharger Boost Sensor A Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor signal implausible
diagnostic_procedure: Check Charge Pressure Sensor (G31).
Verify 5V reference and ground at sensor.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Boost Sensor A Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor voltage below minimum
diagnostic_procedure: Check boost pressure sensor circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Boost Sensor A Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure sensor voltage above maximum
diagnostic_procedure: Check boost pressure sensor circuit for short to voltage.
Refer to [Charge Pressure Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid (N75) circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve (N75) resistance and wiring.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check N75 circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger Wastegate Solenoid A High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Wastegate solenoid circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check N75 circuit for short to battery or open.
Refer to [Wastegate Bypass Regulator Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 1 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 1 (N30) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 1 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 1 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 1 (N30) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 2 (N31) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 2 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 2 (N31) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 3 (N32) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 3 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 3 (N32) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 4 Injector Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 driver circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 4 (N33) for short to ground.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 4 Injector Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Injector 4 driver circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check Injector 4 (N33) for short to battery.
Refer to [Fuel Injector, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Turbocharger / Supercharger Underboost Condition
codes.malfunction_criteria: Boost pressure below target threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for boost leaks in intercooler, charge pipes, and hoses.
Check wastegate solenoid (N75) and diaphragm.
Inspect turbocharger vanes or impeller for damage.
Check charge air pressure sensor (G31).
Refer to [Turbocharger, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Random / Multiple Cylinder Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate exceeds threshold on multiple cylinders
diagnostic_procedure: Check spark plugs for wear or fouling.
Inspect ignition coils (N70/N127/N291/N292) for failure.
Check fuel injectors for proper delivery.
Check for vacuum leaks causing lean misfire.
Inspect compression on all cylinders.
Refer to [Misfire Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 1 Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate on cylinder 1 exceeds threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 1 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 1 with another cylinder to isolate fault.
Check Injector 1 (N30) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 1, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 2 Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate on cylinder 2 exceeds threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 2 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 2 to isolate fault.
Check Injector 2 (N31) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 2, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 3 Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate on cylinder 3 exceeds threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 3 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 3 to isolate fault.
Check Injector 3 (N32) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 3, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Cylinder 4 Misfire Detected
codes.malfunction_criteria: Misfire rate on cylinder 4 exceeds threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check Cylinder 4 spark plug.
Swap ignition coil 4 to isolate fault.
Check Injector 4 (N33) for proper fuel delivery.
Refer to [Misfire, Cylinder 4, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition/Distributor Engine Speed Input Circuit Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Engine speed signal from G28 implausible
diagnostic_procedure: Check Crankshaft Position Sensor (G28) and tone wheel.
Inspect sensor air gap.
Refer to [Crankshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition/Distributor Engine Speed Input Circuit No Signal
codes.malfunction_criteria: No signal from crankshaft position sensor (G28)
diagnostic_procedure: Check Crankshaft Position Sensor (G28) wiring and connector.
Check sensor supply voltage and ground.
Refer to [Crankshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Knock Control System Error
codes.malfunction_criteria: Knock sensor system implausible or no signal
diagnostic_procedure: Check Knock Sensor (G61) wiring and mounting.
Verify sensor torque to spec (20 Nm).
Refer to [Knock Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Knock Sensor 1 Circuit Low Input Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Knock sensor signal voltage below minimum
diagnostic_procedure: Check Knock Sensor (G61) circuit for short to ground.
Inspect sensor connector.
Refer to [Knock Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Knock Sensor 1 Circuit High Input Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Knock sensor signal voltage above maximum
diagnostic_procedure: Check Knock Sensor (G61) circuit for short to voltage.
Inspect sensor connector.
Refer to [Knock Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Malfunction Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: No or erratic camshaft position signal
diagnostic_procedure: Check Camshaft Position Sensor (G40) and wiring.
Inspect sensor trigger wheel for damage.
Refer to [Camshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Range/Performance Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Camshaft position signal implausible
diagnostic_procedure: Check G40 sensor air gap and trigger wheel.
Compare camshaft position vs. crankshaft position.
Refer to [Camshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit Low Input Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Camshaft position sensor signal voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check G40 circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [Camshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Camshaft Position Sensor Circuit High Input Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Camshaft position sensor signal voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check G40 circuit for short to voltage or open.
Refer to [Camshaft Position Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition Coil A Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.malfunction_criteria: Coil 1 (N70) primary circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Ignition Coil 1 (N70) primary resistance and wiring.
Measure supply voltage and ECM trigger signal.
Refer to [Ignition Coil, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition Coil B Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.malfunction_criteria: Coil 2 (N127) primary circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Ignition Coil 2 (N127).
Refer to [Ignition Coil, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition Coil C Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.malfunction_criteria: Coil 3 (N291) primary circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Ignition Coil 3 (N291).
Refer to [Ignition Coil, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Ignition Coil D Primary/Secondary Circuit Malfunction
codes.malfunction_criteria: Coil 4 (N292) primary circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Ignition Coil 4 (N292).
Refer to [Ignition Coil, Checking].

codes.category: Ignition system
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Malfunction
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air flow not detected at cold start
diagnostic_procedure: Check Secondary Air Injection Pump (V101) and relay (J299).
Inspect Secondary Air Injection Valve (N112) for sticking.
Check hoses and pipes for blockage or leaks.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Switching Valve A Circuit Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air injection valve circuit open
diagnostic_procedure: Check Secondary Air Injection Valve (N112) wiring for open circuit.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Switching Valve A Circuit Shorted
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air injection valve circuit shorted
diagnostic_procedure: Check N112 wiring for short circuit.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Switching Valve B Circuit Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air injection valve B circuit open
diagnostic_procedure: Check secondary air injection valve B wiring for open circuit.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Relay A Circuit
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air pump relay (J299) circuit fault
diagnostic_procedure: Check Secondary Air Pump Relay (J299) and wiring.
Verify pump motor current draw.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Downstream O2 sensor oscillation too high relative to upstream
diagnostic_procedure: Check catalytic converter for damage or contamination.
Verify no misfires or oil burning causing catalyst damage.
Check upstream and downstream O2 sensor performance.
Refer to [Catalyst Efficiency, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Incorrect Purge Flow
codes.malfunction_criteria: EVAP purge flow not within expected range
diagnostic_procedure: Check EVAP purge valve (N80) for proper operation.
Inspect EVAP hoses for cracks or disconnection.
Refer to [EVAP System, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (small leak)
codes.malfunction_criteria: EVAP system pressure loss indicating small leak
diagnostic_procedure: Perform EVAP smoke test to locate leak.
Check fuel cap seal and tank vent hoses.
Check EVAP leak detection pump (V144).
Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Purge Control Valve Circuit Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: EVAP purge valve (N80) circuit open
diagnostic_procedure: Check EVAP Purge Valve (N80) resistance and wiring.
Measure ECM output signal to purge valve.
Refer to [EVAP Purge Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (large leak / no flow)
codes.malfunction_criteria: Large EVAP leak or complete loss of pressure
diagnostic_procedure: Check fuel cap for proper sealing.
Inspect EVAP lines and charcoal canister for damage.
Perform EVAP smoke test.
Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (very small leak)
codes.malfunction_criteria: Very small EVAP system leak detected
diagnostic_procedure: Inspect fuel cap seal and filler neck.
Perform EVAP smoke test with dye.
Check EVAP canister vent valve (N115).
Refer to [EVAP System Leak, Diagnosis].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: EVAP Purge Control Valve Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Purge valve circuit voltage low
diagnostic_procedure: Check N80 purge valve circuit for short to ground.
Refer to [EVAP Purge Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: EVAP Purge Control Valve Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Purge valve circuit voltage high
diagnostic_procedure: Check N80 purge valve circuit for short to battery.
Refer to [EVAP Purge Valve, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Secondary Air Injection System Insufficient Flow Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Secondary air flow below minimum during cold start
diagnostic_procedure: Check secondary air injection pump (V101) output.
Inspect one-way check valve for blockage.
Refer to [Secondary Air Injection System, Checking].

codes.category: Additional exhaust regulation
codes.description: Vehicle Speed Sensor A Range/Performance
codes.malfunction_criteria: Vehicle speed signal implausible vs. other sensor inputs
diagnostic_procedure: Check vehicle speed sensor wiring and connector.
Verify ABS wheel speed sensor signals.
Refer to [Vehicle Speed Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Vehicle Speed Sensor A Intermittent/Erratic/High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Erratic or intermittent vehicle speed signal
diagnostic_procedure: Check vehicle speed sensor connector for intermittent contact.
Inspect wiring harness for chafing.
Refer to [Vehicle Speed Sensor, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Idle Air Control System RPM Too Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Idle speed below target by more than specified amount
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle body for carbon deposits causing low idle.
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Check for vacuum leaks.
Refer to [Idle Speed Control, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Idle Air Control System RPM Too High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Idle speed above target by more than specified amount
diagnostic_procedure: Check for vacuum leaks causing high idle.
Check throttle body for sticking throttle plate.
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Refer to [Idle Speed Control, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Internal Control Module Memory Check Sum Error
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECM internal memory checksum failure
diagnostic_procedure: Perform ECM software update / reflash.
Check ECM supply voltage and ground connections.
Replace ECM if fault persists after reflash.
Refer to [ECM, Replacing].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Internal Control Module Random Access Memory (RAM) Error
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECM RAM test failure
diagnostic_procedure: Perform ECM software update.
Check ECM supply voltage stability.
Replace ECM if fault persists.
Refer to [ECM, Replacing].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECM ROM checksum failure
diagnostic_procedure: Reflash ECM with latest software version.
Replace ECM if reflash does not resolve fault.
Refer to [ECM, Replacing].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: ECM/PCM Processor Fault
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECM internal processor self-test failure
diagnostic_procedure: Check ECM power supply and ground connections.
Reflash ECM software.
Replace ECM if fault persists.
Refer to [ECM, Replacing].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Fuel Pump A Control Circuit / Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: ECM fuel pump control output open circuit
diagnostic_procedure: Check fuel pump control circuit from ECM.
Inspect fuel pump relay and wiring.
Refer to [Fuel Pump, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Throttle Actuator Control Range/Performance Bank 1
codes.malfunction_criteria: Throttle actuator response deviates from commanded position
diagnostic_procedure: Check throttle body (J338) for mechanical binding.
Perform throttle body adaptation.
Check throttle actuator motor winding resistance.
Refer to [Throttle Actuator, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage A Circuit / Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V sensor reference circuit A out of range

Identify which sensors are on reference circuit A.
Disconnect sensors one at a time to isolate short.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage A Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V reference circuit A voltage below threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to ground on 5V reference A circuit.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage A Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V reference circuit A voltage above threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to battery on 5V reference A circuit.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage B Circuit / Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V sensor reference circuit B out of range
diagnostic_procedure: Check 5V reference circuit B for short or open.
Disconnect sensors on circuit B to isolate.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage B Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V reference circuit B voltage below threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to ground on 5V reference B circuit.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Sensor Reference Voltage B Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: 5V reference circuit B voltage above threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to battery on 5V reference B circuit.
Refer to [Sensor Supply Voltage, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Actuator Supply Voltage A Circuit / Open
codes.malfunction_criteria: Actuator supply voltage A open circuit
diagnostic_procedure: Check actuator supply voltage circuit from ECM.
Inspect wiring harness for open.
Refer to [ECM Actuator Supply, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Actuator Supply Voltage A Circuit Low
codes.malfunction_criteria: Actuator supply voltage A below threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to ground on actuator supply A.
Refer to [ECM Actuator Supply, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
codes.description: Actuator Supply Voltage A Circuit High
codes.malfunction_criteria: Actuator supply voltage A above threshold
diagnostic_procedure: Check for short to battery on actuator supply A.
Refer to [ECM Actuator Supply, Checking].

codes.category: Fuel, air mixture, and additional emissions regulations
